title: Targeted AS-REP Roasting: DoNotRequirePreAuth Set
description: Detects targeted AS-REP roasting, where an attacker with write access disables Kerberos pre-authentication (DONT_REQ_PREAUTH) on an account so its AS-REP can be requested and cracked offline. Indicators: Set-ADAccountControl -DoesNotRequirePreAuth, or PowerView Set-DomainObject toggling useraccountcontrol.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*DoesNotRequirePreAuth*' or 'Command Line' like '*DONT_REQ_PREAUTH*' or 'Command Line' like '*DONT_REQUIRE_PREAUTH*')) or (('Command Line' like '*useraccountcontrol*' and 'Command Line' like '*4194304*')))
falsepositives: Legacy accounts intentionally configured without pre-authentication
